decisions.question: How should auto-apply be decoupled from the foreground command lifecycle, and how does the concurrency model between background auto-apply and foreground explicit installs work?
decisions.chosen: Option A — Spawn a separate apply subprocess from PersistentPreRun

decisions.question: How should the Notice schema be extended to carry background activity results without breaking existing notice files on user machines?
decisions.chosen: Option A — Add Kind field with backward-compatible JSON unmarshaling

decisions.question: How should distributed registry initialization in main.go init() be protected against unbounded startup hangs?
decisions.chosen: Option A — Add context timeout; skip source on timeout (best-effort)
